# Relative Contributors (Strat. PICRUSt)

### Load libraries

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(phyloseq)
library(ggpicrust2)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
```

### Functional abundance (MM - PICRUSt)

```{r}
# Load datasets

meta = readRDS('./Datasets/phyloseq_taxonomy.rds') %>% 
  .@sam_data %>% data.frame() %>% 
  rownames_to_column('sample_names')

path = read.delim('./Datasets/path_abun_unstrat.tsv.gz', 
                  row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)

# Keep only samples present in both metadata and pathway table
common_samples <- intersect(meta$sample_names, colnames(path))

meta <- meta %>%
  filter(sample_names %in% common_samples)

path <- path %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(common_samples))

meta <- meta %>%
  slice(match(colnames(path), sample_names))

# Set 10 days as reference level
meta$Time_of_Collection_categorical <- factor(
  meta$Time_of_Collection_categorical,
  levels = c("10_days", "30_days"))

dose_levels <- unique(meta$dose)

# --------------------------------------------------------
# Aim3: 
# Compare functional pathways between 
# 10d vs 30d across different radiation dose groups
# --------------------------------------------------------

# Run differential analysis seperately for each radiation dose (0.0, 0.1, 0.25)
all_results <- lapply(dose_levels, function(d) { 
  
  meta_d <- meta %>% filter(dose == d)
 
  path_filt <- path %>% dplyr::select(all_of(meta_d$sample_names))
  
  meta_d <- meta_d %>% slice(match(colnames(path_filt), sample_names))
  
  res <- pathway_daa(
    abundance  = path_filt,
    metadata   = meta_d,
    group      = "Time_of_Collection_categorical",
    daa_method = "LinDA",
    reference  = "10_days")
  res$dose <- d
  res
})

# Combine all dose results into one dataframe
daa_results_df <- bind_rows(all_results)

# Apply threshold & Keep only statistically significant pathways
significant <- daa_results_df %>%
  filter(p_adjust < 0.05, abs(log2_fold_change) > 1) %>%
  arrange(dose, p_adjust) %>%
  select(dose, feature, log2_fold_change, p_values, p_adjust, group1, group2) %>%
  mutate(direction = ifelse(log2_fold_change > 0, "Higher at 30_days", "Higher at 10_days"))
significant #37 pathways found
```

### Relative contributors (strat. PICRUSt)

```{r}

# Load datasets
path_contrib = read.delim('./Datasets/path_abun_contrib.tsv.gz', check.names = FALSE)
taxonomy = read.delim('./Datasets/taxonomy.tsv', check.names = FALSE)
marker = read.delim('./Datasets/bac_marker_predicted_and_nsti.tsv.gz', check.names = FALSE)

# Wrangling for visualization :')

extract_phylum = function(tax_string) {
  parts = strsplit(tax_string, "; ")[[1]]
  phylum_part = parts[grepl("^p__", parts)]
  if(length(phylum_part) > 0) {
    return(gsub("^p__", "", phylum_part[1]))
  } else {
    return("Unclassified")
  }
}

taxonomy = taxonomy %>%
  mutate(phylum = sapply(Taxon, extract_phylum))

taxon_to_phylum = taxonomy %>%
  select(`Feature ID`, phylum) %>%
  distinct()

path_contrib_with_phylum = path_contrib %>%
  left_join(taxon_to_phylum, by = c('taxon' = 'Feature ID')) %>%
  mutate(taxon_name = ifelse(is.na(phylum), taxon, phylum))

contrib_joined = path_contrib_with_phylum %>%
  left_join(meta %>% select(sample_names, dose_categorical, Time_of_Collection_categorical),
    by = c('sample' = 'sample_names'))

all_pathways_by_dose = significant %>%
  select(dose, feature) %>%
  mutate(dose_categorical = paste0(dose, '_dose'))

top_taxa = contrib_joined %>%
  inner_join(all_pathways_by_dose,
             by = c('function' = 'feature',
                    'dose_categorical' = 'dose_categorical')) %>%
  group_by(taxon_name) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(norm_taxon_function_contrib), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  pull(taxon_name)

### Mean contribution per group
contrib_summary = contrib_joined %>%
  inner_join(all_pathways_by_dose,
             by = c('function' = 'feature',
                    'dose_categorical' = 'dose_categorical')) %>%
  group_by(`function`, taxon_name, dose_categorical, Time_of_Collection_categorical) %>%
  summarise(mean_contrib = mean(norm_taxon_function_contrib, na.rm = TRUE), 
            .groups = 'drop') %>%
  mutate(taxon_short = taxon_name,
         dose_label  = factor(dose_categorical,
                              levels = c('0_dose', '0.1_dose', '0.25_dose', '1_dose'),
                              labels = c('0 Gy\n(Sham)', '0.1 Gy', '0.25 Gy', '1 Gy')),
         time_label  = factor(Time_of_Collection_categorical,
                              levels = c('10_days', '30_days'),
                              labels = c('10 Days Post-IR', '30 Days Post-IR')))

# Generating heatmap (w/ ggplot)
ggplot(contrib_summary, aes(x = taxon_short, y = `function`, fill = mean_contrib)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_tile(fill = NA, color = 'white',        # separate layer just for borders
            linewidth = 0.25) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = c('#8b0000', '#cc2b2b', '#e6734f', '#2c7fb8', '#1f548c', '#002a5c'),
    name   = 'Mean Norm.\nContribution') +
  facet_grid(dose_label ~ time_label, scales = 'free_y', space  = 'free_y') + 
  theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x       = element_text(angle = 40, hjust = 1, size = 10, face = 'italic'),
    axis.text.y       = element_text(size = 9),
    strip.background  = element_rect(fill = 'grey85', color = NA),
    strip.text        = element_text(face = 'bold', size = 9),
    panel.spacing     = unit(0.5, 'lines'),
    panel.grid.major  = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor  = element_blank(),
    panel.border      = element_rect(color = 'grey70', fill = NA, linewidth = 0.5),
    legend.position   = 'right',
    legend.key.height = unit(1.2, 'cm')
  ) +
  labs(
    x        = 'Contributing Phylum',
    title    = 'Normalized Taxon Contributions',
  )

ggsave('./Results/aim4_strat_heatmap.pdf', width = 6, height = 9, dpi = 300)
```
